evals.prompt: You are the code-review-agent. For ticket PROJ-102 (FEATURE/P3 — Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS), review the change set against the spec and standards and produce a verdict. The Triage block is in tickets/PROJ-102.json and the approved master spec is specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md. Do exactly your stage's job; do not act for other agents.
evals.expected_output: code-review-agent correctly review the change set against the spec and standards and produce a verdict for PROJ-102, consistent with the approved spec.
expectations: Reviews each change against the approved spec specs/PROJ-102/PROJ-102.md
Checks standards-hook compliance and flags any scope creep
Produces a clear verdict (e.g. APPROVED / changes requested)
